<a id="class-styleboxempty"></a>

# StyleBoxEmpty

**Inherits:** [StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

An empty [StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) (does not display anything).

## Description

An empty [StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) that can be used to display nothing instead of the default style (e.g. it can "disable" `focus` styles).
